jsonLd.title: Shiprocket is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Shiprocket invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of E-commerce Executive at our Vadodara location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Shiprocket:
Shiprocket is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shiprocket!
